# SPACE had no impact

# I recall earlier absorbing a charcoal square at (36,32)-(39,35)
# Let me check the initial frames

# Check earliest frames for initial state
if len(history) > 0:
    early_seg = history[0].frame.segmentation
    print("Initial frame objects:")
    for n in early_seg['nodes']:
        b = n['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        if n['color'] not in ['w', 'g']:
            print(f"  color={n['color']}, pixels={n['pixels']}, bbox=({min(rows)},{min(cols)})-({max(rows)},{max(cols)}), children={n['children']}")

# Check if there's a dark gray object anywhere (from earlier absorption)
seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'G':
        b = n['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        print(f"\nDark gray object: bbox=({min(rows)},{min(cols)})-({max(rows)},{max(cols)})")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
